admin.title: Admin access required
admin.description: This page is only available to administrators.

chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

status.fallbackActive: System is operating in fallback mode

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage AI model providers and configure your active connection.
providers.addProviderDescription: Configure a new AI model provider to use with your agent.
providers.editProviderDescription: Update the configuration for this provider.
providers.noProviders: No providers configured yet. Add one to get started.
providers.name: Name
providers.apiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep existing key
providers.oauthWaitingHint: Complete the login in the browser tab that just opened.
providers.oauthManualCode: Or paste the redirect URL here (for remote servers):
providers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{name}"?
providers.fallbackProviderHint: Automatically switch to this provider when the active one goes down.
providers.degradedThresholdHint: Latency above this value (in ms) marks the provider as degraded in health checks.

logs.title: Activity Logs
logs.subtitle: Monitor tool calls, execution times, and errors in real time or historically.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Edit personality, core memory, and day-by-day notes without leaving the dashboard.
memory.noDailyFiles: No daily files yet. Pick a date to create one.
memory.noDailyFilesInRange: No daily files in the selected range.
memory.dailyBrowserDescription: Jump to any day, review existing notes, or create a new memory entry for the selected date.
memory.dailyEditorDescription: Daily notes are included in the rolling memory context for the agent.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune how the agent behaves, how long sessions live, and how Telegram messages are handled.
settings.sessionSectionDescription: Control how long conversations stay warm before they are summarized and closed.
settings.sessionTimeoutHint: After this many minutes of inactivity, the current session is summarized and reset.
settings.languageSectionDescription: Decide whether the agent follows a fixed language or mirrors the user's language automatically.
settings.languageHint: This setting is injected directly into the system prompt and applies immediately.
settings.timezoneHint: The current date and time in this timezone are included in the system prompt so the agent always knows when it is.
settings.agentSectionDescription: Fine-tune heartbeat timing and message batching for connected channels.
settings.heartbeatHint: Defines how often heartbeat checks should run.
settings.heartbeatFallbackTriggerHint: When to activate the fallback provider.
settings.heartbeatFailuresBeforeFallbackHint: Consecutive failures required before switching to fallback.
settings.heartbeatRecoveryCheckIntervalHint: How often to check if the primary provider has recovered.
settings.heartbeatSuccessesBeforeRecoveryHint: Consecutive successes required before switching back from fallback.
settings.heartbeatNotificationsDescription: Choose which status transitions trigger a notification.
settings.batchingDelayHint: Telegram messages received inside this window are grouped before the agent responds.
settings.telegramSectionDescription: Manage the bot token used by the Telegram integration.
settings.telegramEnabledHint: When enabled, the bot connects to Telegram and responds to messages.
settings.telegramBotTokenHint: Leave empty to disable the configured token or replace it with a new one.
settings.telegramUsersDescription: Manage which Telegram users are allowed to interact with the bot.
settings.telegramUsersEmpty: No Telegram users yet. Users appear here after they message the bot.
settings.telegramUsersDeleteConfirm: Remove Telegram user "{name}"? They will appear as pending again if they message the bot.
settings.consolidationSectionDescription: Automatically review daily memory entries and promote lasting insights into core memory (MEMORY.md).
settings.consolidationEnabledHint: When enabled, a daily job reviews recent daily entries and updates core memory if needed.
settings.consolidationRunAtHourHint: Hour of the day (0–23) when the consolidation job runs. Uses server local time.
settings.consolidationLookbackDaysHint: Number of past days of daily memory to review in each run.
settings.consolidationProviderHint: Choose a specific provider/model for consolidation, or use the active provider.

tabs.heartbeatDescription: Health checks, fallback behavior, and status notifications.
tabs.memoryDescription: Session behavior and automatic memory consolidation.
tabs.telegramDescription: Configure the Telegram bot token and message batching.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Create accounts, assign roles, and manage linked Telegram identities.
users.addUserDescription: Create a new account with a username, password, and role.
users.editUserDescription: Update the role or reset the password for this account.
users.passwordHint: Passwords must be at least 4 characters.
users.passwordOptional: Leave blank to keep the current password
users.passwordResetHint: Only enter a value if you want to replace the current password.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete user "{username}"? This action cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A quick control room for the most important moving parts in your OpenAgent deployment.
dashboard.quickActionsDescription: Jump straight into the parts of the system you manage most often.
dashboard.systemSnapshotDescription: Current runtime configuration at a glance.
dashboard.recentHealthChecksDescription: A short trail of the latest provider heartbeat results.

cards.messagesMeta: All chat messages recorded since midnight
cards.queueMeta: Current in-flight work handled by the agent

actions.memory: Edit SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, and daily memory files.
actions.settings: Change runtime behavior and Telegram configuration.
actions.providers: Manage model providers and activate a default model.
actions.users: Add admins, reset passwords, and remove unused accounts.
actions.logs: Inspect recent tool activity and historical execution data.
actions.usage: Review token consumption, providers, and estimated spend.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Install and manage skills to extend your agent's capabilities.
skills.emptyDescription: Skills add new capabilities to your agent. Install your first skill to get started.
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete skill "{name}"? This will remove the skill files from disk.
skills.installDescription: Install a skill from a URL or upload a .zip/.skill file.
skills.settingsDescription: Configure environment variables for this skill.
skills.envValuePlaceholder: Enter value (leave empty to keep current)
skills.webSearchDescription: Allow the agent to search the web for current information.
skills.braveApiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep the existing key.
skills.searxngUrlHint: The URL of your self-hosted SearXNG instance.
skills.webFetchDescription: Allow the agent to fetch and read web page content.

usage.title: Token Usage
usage.subtitle: Explore token consumption, compare providers, and track estimated spend across any time range.
usage.emptyDescription: Once the agent starts talking to models, this page will show daily totals, provider breakdowns, and estimated costs.
usage.emptyFilteredDescription: Try widening the date range or clearing the provider/model filters to see more activity.

chart.title: Daily token volume
chart.description: Day-by-day token usage across the selected range.
chart.empty: No daily usage to chart for the current filters.

table.title: Provider & model breakdown
table.description: Detailed breakdown of usage and estimated cost per provider/model pair.
